title: Time differences (within 60 minutes)
description: Practice finding the difference between times given on two analog clocks. Each time difference is less than 60 minutes.

assessment_items.question_content:
Look at the time on the following clock.



[[☃ image 1]]

**Which clock shows a time that is $43$ minutes later?**    

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The first clock reads $\redD6{:}\blueD{37}$.



[[☃ image 1]]



[[☃ image 2]]

Now, let's find $43$ minutes after $\redD6{:}\blueD{37}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

$\begin{align}
{\redD6{:}\blueD{37}} +{} &\goldE{3}\text{ minutes} = 6{:}40\\\\
6{:}40 +{} & \purpleD{20}\text{ minutes} = 7{:}00 \\\\
7{:}10 +{}&\greenD{20}\text{ minutes} = {\redD7{:}\blueD{20}}
\end{align}$

$\redD7{:}\blueD{20}$ is $43$ minutes after $\redD6{:}\blueD{37}$.



[[☃ image 1]]



Which clock shows $\redD7{:}\blueD{20}$?

This clock shows $\redD7{:}\blueD{20}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

options.alt: A clock with every hour labeled and tick marks every 1 minute.  The short hand points between the 6 and the 7. The long hand points to the second tick mark after the 7.

choices.content: ![A clock with every hour labeled and tick marks every 1 minute. The short hand points between the 7 and the 8. The long hand points to the 4.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bcf54cb848a8d54b219ad2cc5a4fb758aba63f2d)

![A clock with every hour labeled and tick marks every 1 minute. The short hand points between the 6 and the 7. The long hand points to the 4.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c6fc6de7c73b485b1813307fc0e8892f029c14c1)

![A clock with every hour labeled and tick marks every 1 minute. . The short hand points between the 7 and 8. The long hand points to the 2.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/996cd3f7b1a3ba1a89f5448c953d661b48d1bf20)

assessment_items.question_content:
Look at the time on the following clock.



[[☃ image 1]]

**Which clock shows a time that is $55$ minutes later?**    

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The first clock reads $\redD7{:}\blueD{23}$.



[[☃ image 1]]



[[☃ image 2]]

Now, let's find $55$ minutes after $\redD7{:}\blueD{23}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

$\begin{align}
{\redD7{:}\blueD{23}} +{} &\goldE{7}\text{ minutes} = 7{:}30\\\\
7{:}30 +{} & \tealD{30}\text{ minutes} = 8{:}00 \\\\
8{:}00 +{} & \purpleD{10}\text{ minutes} = 8{:}10 \\\\
8{:}10 +{}&\greenD{8}\text{ minutes} = {\redD8{:}\blueD{18}}
\end{align}$

$\redD8{:}\blueD{18}$ is $55$ minutes after $\redD7{:}\blueD{23}$.

[[☃ image 1]]

Which clock shows $\redD8{:}\blueD{18}$?

This clock shows $\redD8{:}\blueD{18}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
Look at the time on the following clock.



[[☃ image 1]]

**Which clock shows a time that is $27$ minutes later?**    

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The first clock reads $\redD{10}{:}\blueD{42}$.



[[☃ image 1]]



[[☃ image 2]]

Now, let's find $27$ minutes after $\redD{10}{:}\blueD{42}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

$\begin{align}
{\redD{10}{:}\blueD{42}} +{} &\goldE{8}\text{ minutes} = 10{:}50\\\\
10{:}50 +{} & \purpleD{10}\text{ minutes} = 11{:}00 \\\\
11{:}00 +{}&\greenD{9}\text{ minutes} = {\redD{11}{:}\blueD{09}}
\end{align}$

$\redD{11}{:}\blueD{09}$ is $27$ minutes after $\redD{10}{:}\blueD{42}$.



[[☃ image 1]]



Which clock shows $\redD{11}{:}\blueD{09}$?

This clock shows $\redD{11}{:}\blueD{09}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
Look at the time on the following clock.



[[☃ image 1]]

**Which clock shows a time that is $38$ minutes later?**    

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The first clock reads $\redD3{:}\blueD{14}$.



[[☃ image 1]]



[[☃ image 2]]

Now, let's find $38$ minutes after $\redD3{:}\blueD{14}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

$\begin{align}
{\redD3{:}\blueD{14}} +{} &\goldE{6}\text{ minutes} = 3{:}20\\\\
3{:}20 +{} & \purpleD{30}\text{ minutes} = 3{:}50 \\\\
3{:}50 +{}&\greenD{2}\text{ minutes} = {\redD3{:}\blueD{52}}
\end{align}$

$\redD3{:}\blueD{52}$ is $38$ minutes after $\redD3{:}\blueD{14}$.



[[☃ image 1]]



Which clock shows $\redD3{:}\blueD{52}$?

This clock shows $\redD3{:}\blueD{52}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

hints:

[[☃ image 2]]

Now, let's find $19$ minutes after $\redD9{:}\blueD{06}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

$\begin{align}
{\redD9{:}\blueD{06}} +{} &\goldE{4}\text{ minutes} = 9{:}10\\\\
9{:}10 +{} & \purpleD{10}\text{ minutes} = 9{:}20 \\\\
9{:}20 +{}&\greenD{5}\text{ minutes} = {\redD9{:}\blueD{25}}
\end{align}$

$\redD9{:}\blueD{25}$ is $19$ minutes after $\redD9{:}\blueD{06}$.



[[☃ image 1]]



Which clock shows $\redD9{:}\blueD{25}$?

This clock shows $\redD9{:}\blueD{25}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
Look at the time on the following clocks.



[[☃ image 1]]



[[☃ image 2]]

**How much time has passed from the first clock to the second clock?**    
*The time passed is less than $12$ hours.*

[[☃ numeric-input 2]] minutes
hints:
The first clock reads $\blueD8{:}\blueD{37}$.

The second clock reads $\blueD8{:}\blueD{54}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

Now, let's figure out how much time passes between $\blueD8{:}\blueD{37}$ and $\blueD8{:}\blueD{54}$.




[[☃ image 1]]

$\begin{align}
\blueD{8{:}37} +{} &\purpleD{3}\text{ minutes} = 8{:}40\\\\
8{:}40 +{} & \goldE{10}\text{ minutes} = 8{:}50 \\\\
8{:}50 +{}&\greenD{4}\text{ minutes} = \blueD{8{:}54}\\\\
\end{align}$

To find the total time between $\blueD8{:}\blueD{37}$ and $\blueD8{:}\blueD{54}$, we add.

$\purpleD{3}\text{ min}+\goldE{10}\text{ min}+\greenD{4}\text{ min}=17\text{ minutes}$
${17}$ minutes have passed.

options.alt: A clock with every hour labeled and tick marks every 1 minute. The short hand points between the 8 and the 9. The long hand points to the second tick mark after the 7.
A clock with every hour labeled and tick marks every 1 minute. The short hand points to the 9. The long hand points to the fourth tick mark after the 10.

assessment_items.question_content:
Look at the time on the following clocks.



[[☃ image 1]]



[[☃ image 2]]

**How much time has passed from the first clock to the second clock?**    
*The time passed is less than $12$ hours.*

[[☃ numeric-input 2]] minutes
hints:
The first clock reads $\blueD{12}{:}\blueD{04}$.

The second clock reads $\blueD{12}{:}\blueD{56}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

Now, let's figure out how much time passes between $\blueD{12}{:}\blueD{04}$ and $\blueD{12}{:}\blueD{56}$.




[[☃ image 1]]

$\begin{align}
\blueD{12{:}04} +{} &\purpleD{6}\text{ minutes} = 12{:}10\\\\
12{:}10 +{} & \goldE{40}\text{ minutes} = 12{:}50 \\\\
12{:}50 +{}&\greenD{6}\text{ minutes} = \blueD{12{:}56}\\\\
\end{align}$

To find the total time between $\blueD{12}{:}\blueD{04}$ and $\blueD{12}{:}\blueD{56}$, we add.

$\purpleD{6}\text{ min}+\goldE{40}\text{ min}+\greenD{6}\text{ min}=52\text{ minutes}$
${52}$ minutes have passed.

options.alt: A clock with every hour labeled and tick marks every 1 minute The short hand points to between the 12 and 1. The long hand points to the fourth tick mark after the 12.
A clock with every hour labeled and tick marks to show minutes. The short hand points between the 12 and 1. The long hand points to the first tick mark after the 11.
